scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix plc-controller && npm install --prefix sensor-service && npm install --prefix motor-service && npm install --prefix conveyor-service && npm install --prefix robot-arm-service && npm install --prefix alarm-service && npm install --prefix energy-service && npm install --prefix notification-service
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix api-gateway" "npm run start --prefix plc-controller" "npm run start --prefix sensor-service" "npm run start --prefix motor-service" "npm run start --prefix conveyor-service" "npm run start --prefix robot-arm-service" "npm run start --prefix alarm-service" "npm run start --prefix energy-service" "npm run start --prefix notification-service"
